all_pages.description: Every .html file needs these two lines inserted

empty_state_patch.when_empty: renderEmptyState('videoGrid', {title: '暂无视频', text: '换个分类试试', icon: '🎬'});

skeleton_patch.description: Replace '加载中...' in sidebar history with skeleton
skeleton_patch.location: historyList innerHTML in renderHistoryList empty case

skeleton_patch.description: Show skeleton while fetching subtitle/audio results
skeleton_patch.before_api_call:
document.getElementById('subtitleResult').innerHTML = '
';

error_state_patch.description: Error state for failed folder loading
error_state_patch.on_error: hideSkeleton('folderList'); renderErrorState('folderList', {message: '加载收藏夹失败', onRetry: loadFolders});

skeleton_patch.description: Show skeleton while loading KB list

empty_state_patch.if_no_entries: renderEmptyState('kbList', {title: '知识库为空', text: '前往收藏夹导入你的第一个视频', icon: '📚', actionHTML: '前往收藏夹'});

applied_principles: Typography pairing: system sans-serif body + emoji icons for visual rhythm
Hero is thesis: whale as interactive centerpiece instead of static decoration
One bold risk: interactive whale with 3-state finite state machine (idle/hover/leap)
Deliberate motion: orchestrated page transitions via View Transition API, not scattered effects
Restraint: removed decorative pseudo-elements, replaced with intentional interactive components
anthropic-frontend-design.synergy: The SKILL.md design principles (ground in subject, typography carries personality, structure is information) map directly to BiliSum's sky-whale theme. The whale IS the subject -- making it interactive aligns with 'the hero is a thesis'.

applied_techniques: Staggered card entry with nth-child delays (0.03s increments)
Parallax: 3-layer cloud system with independent drift speeds
Modal: scale(0.92) + translateY(20px) entrance with backdrop-filter transition
css-animation-creator.synergy: Parallax cloud layers use the animation-creator's layered motion approach. The whale's 3-state machine (breathe/curious/leap) follows the creator's state-transition pattern.

applied_checks: No pure #000 -- whale eye uses #3a5a7c (soft deep blue)
Max 1 accent sat<80% -- coral/pink accent at appropriate saturation
Whale color palette uses 6 pastel tokens, not random hex values
Blush integration: whale blush (#fce4ec) matches the sky gradient tone
Gold stars: #fff1c1 and #fffdf0 are warm golds, not harsh yellows
taste-skill.synergy: Taste-skill's color constraints (no pure black, max accent saturation) are directly embedded in the whale SVG palette via --whale-* CSS tokens.

priority_execution_order: P0: Add <link> and <script> tags to all 5 .html files
P0: Replace body::before clouds with JS cloud layers (initClouds)
P0: Replace body::after whale with interactive JS whale (initWhale)
P1: Add .open / .closing class toggles to modal show/hide functions
P1: Add data-ui-state attributes to stateful containers
P2: Apply skeleton calls before every API fetch
P2: Apply error state renders on every .catch()
